ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the college */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the college */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the college was established */,
  "student_body_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the college */,
  "degrees_offered" TEXT /* Types of degrees offered by the college */,
  "tuition_fees" REAL /* Tuition fees for the college */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_info" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact info entry */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the college */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the college */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the college */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_info_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course availability metric */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "score" REAL /* Score representing course availability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course availability metric */,
  "num_courses_offered" INTEGER /* Number of courses offered by the college */,
  "num_students_per_course" INTEGER /* Average number of students per course */,
  "num_faculty_members" INTEGER /* Number of faculty members in the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_availability_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advising" (
  "advising_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic advising metric */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "score" REAL /* Score representing academic advising quality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the academic advising metric */,
  "advisor_to_student_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of advisors to students */,
  "num_advising_sessions_per_student" INTEGER /* Average number of advising sessions per student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advising_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advising_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diversity" (
  "diversity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diversity metric */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "score" REAL /* Score representing diversity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diversity metric */,
  "num_minority_students" INTEGER /* Number of minority students in the college */,
  "num_international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students in the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diversity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campus_life" (
  "life_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus life metric */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "score" REAL /* Score representing campus life */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campus life metric */,
  "num_clubs_and_organizations" INTEGER /* Number of clubs and organizations on campus */,
  "num_campus_events_per_year" INTEGER /* Number of campus events per year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campus_life_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_placement" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job placement metric */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "score" REAL /* Score representing job placement rates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job placement metric */,
  "num_students_placed" INTEGER /* Number of students placed in jobs after graduation */,
  "avg_salary_after_graduation" REAL /* Average salary of students after graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_placement_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_preferences" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the student (e.g., course availability, diversity) */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the student is interested in */,
  "course_availability_weight" REAL /* Weight given to course availability in college selection */,
  "advising_weight" REAL /* Weight given to academic advising quality in college selection */,
  "diversity_weight" REAL /* Weight given to diversity in college selection */,
  "campus_life_weight" REAL /* Weight given to campus life in college selection */,
  "job_placement_weight" REAL /* Weight given to job placement rates in college selection */,
  "location_preference" TEXT /* Location preference of the student */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_preferences_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who wrote the review */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the college by the student */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES student_preferences ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_reviews_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the recommendation */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended college */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES student_preferences ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "college_trends" (
  "college_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college trend */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend in the context of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_trends_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_trends_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)
